title: stisseria divaricata
intro: Stisseria divaricata, also known as Cynanchum divaricatum, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stisseria divaricata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
